original_problem: In a factory, there are three machines A, B, and C. Machine A produces 200 units per hour, Machine B produces 300 units per hour, and Machine C produces 400 units per hour. However, the production rate of each machine decreases by 10% every hour due to wear and tear. If all machines start working at the same time and Machine A works for 4 hours, Machine B works for 5 hours, and Machine C works for 6 hours, what is the total production of all machines? Additionally, if the factory operates 5 days a week and each day the machines work as described, how much does the factory produce in a 4-week period, considering that in the last week, the production rate of all machines is increased by 20% due to an upgrade?
deconstructed_problem: In a factory, there are three machines A, B, and C. Machine A produces 200 units per hour, Machine B produces 300 units per hour, and Machine C produces 400 units per hour. However, the production rate of each machine decreases by 10% every hour due to wear and tear. ଯଦି (if) all machines start working at the same time and Machine A works for 4 hours, Machine B works for 5 hours, and Machine C works for 6 hours, what is the ମୋଟ (total) production of all machines? Additionally, ଯଦି (if) the factory operates 5 days a week and each day the machines work as described, how much does the factory produce in a 4-week period, considering that in the last week, the production rate of all machines is increased by 20% due to an upgrade?
original_steps: Step 1: Calculate the production rate of each machine for each hour, taking into account the 10% decrease in production rate per hour.
Step 2: Calculate the total production of each machine over the specified number of hours, considering the decrease in production rate.
Step 3: Sum the total production of all machines for one day.
Step 4: Calculate the total production of the factory for a 4-week period, considering the factory operates 5 days a week.
Step 5: Apply the 20% increase in production rate for all machines in the last week and recalculate the total production for that week.
skeleton_steps: ପଦକ୍ଷେପ (step) 1: Calculate the production rate of each machine for each hour, taking into account the 10% decrease in production rate per hour.
ପଦକ୍ଷେପ (step) 2: Calculate the ମୋଟ (total) production of each machine over the specified number of hours, considering the decrease in production rate.
ପଦକ୍ଷେପ (step) 3: ସମଷ୍ଟି (sum) the ମୋଟ (total) production of all machines for one day.
ପଦକ୍ଷେପ (step) 4: Calculate the ମୋଟ (total) production of the factory for a 4-week period, considering the factory operates 5 days a week.
ପଦକ୍ଷେପ (step) 5: Apply the 20% increase in production rate for all machines in the last week and recalculate the ମୋଟ (total) production for that week.
